g.text: No new locations found within scanner range.
No new signatures in range. Try moving to a different location.
Hot vapor rises from dozens of vents. The ice here is thin and treacherous.
Trust: 100/100 (high) — 'bye' or '/end' to disconnect | /? for help
Ask Iyren where the best source for ice crystals can be found.
Translation mostly clear. A few gaps.
A human? On Enceladus? That is... unexpected. Tell me more about your ship and how you ended up here. I have seen strange
things drift in from the void before.
Ask Iyren about the ship or the unexpected human to gather more intelligence.
Getting about 80% of the nuance here.
I might consider it, but I need to see what you mean. My shelter is built to last, and I have my own concerns here on
Enceladus. What kind of fixes are needed?
Iyren appears highly cooperative. Trust is strong.
Tip: Iyren trusts you enough to escort. Type 'escort' to ask.
Companions help with repairs at the Crash Site.
